client_id.description: Unique identifier for the Azure AD application used to authenticate and access resources.

display_name.description: Name of the application as it will appear in the Azure Active Directory. Must be unique within the tenant.

identifier_uri.description: Defines the unique URI used to identify the application within Azure AD. Must be a valid URI format and cannot exceed 256 characters.

object_id.description: Unique identifier of the Azure AD application, used for referencing the application in Azure AD.

timeouts.description: Defines the duration allowed for create, read, update, and delete operations on the application.
